summary: Created reusable CardVisual presentational component that renders a Card as a premium visual card with: title (prompt), question text (guidance), category label, tier marker with text label and color accent (left border), and conditional flavour text. Styled with CSS Modules using existing design tokens for a tactile, physical-card feel. Tier accessibility ensured via text labels alongside color. Exported from ui barrel file. All 10 unit tests pass covering rendering, conditional logic, semantic HTML, and tier attributes.
